aboutGame.title: What is VV: ULTIMATUM?
paragraphs: VV: ULTIMATUM is a stylized fighting RPG on Roblox inspired by the Bleach anime universe. Choose from three playable races Shinigami, Quincy, or Hollow each with unique progression systems, unlockable abilities, and evolution paths. Master over 130 skills as you fight your way to the level 100 cap.

Whether you're unlocking your first Shikai, evolving from a base Hollow into an Arrancar, or grinding Quincy Lieutenant missions, our wiki covers every system with detailed guides, data tables, and step-by-step walkthroughs.

modules.name: VV Ultimatum Beginner Guide
modules.description: Use the first hour to lock in a faction route, learn the live controls, and push quests instead of burning resources on random rerolls.

highlights.detail: Choose a faction route before spending rerolls
Finish the opening path and learn the live controls
Redeem the launch code once the Shop unlocks
Push story quests before side grinding
Start mission systems as soon as they open
Spend early points around one damage plan

modules.name: VV Ultimatum Clans Tier List
modules.description: Treat Clan Rerolls as route-shaping resources. The best keeps depend on faction identity.

highlights.label: S
highlights.detail: Kurosaki · Shihoin · Cifer — Do not reroll

highlights.label: A
highlights.detail: Eisenhauer · Ishida · Kamamura · Aaroniero — Keep for build

highlights.label: B
highlights.detail: Parnkgjas · Hitsugaya · Antenor — Good for leveling

highlights.label: C
highlights.detail: Schulte · Madarame · Calius — Reroll when affordable

modules.name: VV Ultimatum Skill Tree Tier List
modules.description: Builds work best when players choose a clear combat core instead of spreading Skill Points across unrelated routes.

highlights.label: S
highlights.detail: Hakuda (melee combos) · Speed (mobility core)

highlights.label: A
highlights.detail: Quincy (bow pressure) · Strength (heavy hits) · Shinigami (Kido control)

highlights.label: B
highlights.detail: Hollow / Arrancar (Cero burst windows)

highlights.label: Utility
highlights.detail: Sense (target reading) · Misc (universal combat tools)

modules.name: VV Ultimatum Weapons Tier List
modules.description: Weapon choices are tied to race. Quincy get the clearest starter list, while Shinigami focus on Zanpakuto growth.

highlights.label: S
highlights.detail: Sword — Balanced all-rounder, safest Quincy starter

highlights.label: A
highlights.detail: Spear (long reach) · Longsword (safe range)

highlights.label: B
highlights.detail: Greatsword · Hammer · Club — Heavy or niche pressure

highlights.label: C
highlights.detail: Rifle · Rapier — Playable but outclassed

modules.name: VV Ultimatum Hollow Progression Guide
modules.description: Hollow progression rewards patience: rushing mask removal too early can leave the final build weaker than necessary.

highlights.detail: Choose a Hollow Type (Gorilla, Lizard, Turtle, Centipede)
Consume Hollows and collect matching traits
Advance from base Hollow → Menos → Adjuchas
Push to Vasto Lorde for the 4-trait ceiling
Remove mask → Become Arrancar or Vastocar
Meditate and win the Resurrection Fight

modules.name: VV Ultimatum Shinigami Progression Guide
modules.description: The Shinigami route is built around steady questing, Soul Pager missions, meditation timing, and the eventual Shikai fight.

highlights.detail: Run Main Story Quests to unlock the progression loop
Unlock Soul Society and buy the Soul Pager
Reach Level 25 and start meditation
Respond to Spirit Whispers for Shikai EXP
Solve the Bells Puzzle in the Inner World
Fight the Shikai NPC and unlock Shikai weapon

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.description: Quick answers to the most common questions about VV: ULTIMATUM.

items.question: What is VV: ULTIMATUM?
items.answer: VV: ULTIMATUM is a free-to-play fighting RPG on Roblox based on the Bleach anime. You choose one of three races Shinigami (Soul Reaper), Quincy, or Hollow each with unique progression, combat abilities, and evolution systems. The game features 130+ skills, a level 100 cap, boss fights, and deep build customization.

items.question: Which race should beginners pick?
items.answer: Shinigami is the most straightforward starter race, while Hollow and Quincy offer more specialized progression routes. Compare their abilities before committing.

items.question: What is the current level cap?
items.answer: The current level cap is 100, with more than 130 skills available across trees and race progression systems.

items.question: Where do I find active codes?
items.answer: Use the Codes page for working codes, rewards, expiration notes, and redeem instructions.

items.question: Are boss guides updated?
items.answer: Boss pages are organized with spawn notes, attack patterns, strategies, drop tables, and related next steps for progression.

finalCta.title: Ready to Master VV: ULTIMATUM?
finalCta.description: From your first steps in Fort Adams to endgame boss fights our community wiki has you covered with free, up-to-date guides.

meta.title: Bosses — Complete Guide & Walkthrough | VV Ultimatum Wiki
meta.description: Complete boss guides for VV: ULTIMATUM — all bosses from tutorial Gelum to endgame encounters with strategies, drops, and respawn timers.

bosses.overviewDescription: Complete guides for every boss encounter in VV: ULTIMATUM 13 bosses from the tutorial knight Gelum to endgame encounters like the Gelid Dweller and Gauntlet challenges.
bosses.body: Bosses in VV: ULTIMATUM serve as skill gates and progression milestones. Some, like Gelum, teach you the combat fundamentals during the tutorial. Others, such as the Shikai Spirit and Resurreccion Spirit, are inner-world encounters tied directly to your race's power unlock. Area bosses like Dragonfly, King Croc, and Securis guard access to new zones and rewards. Recent additions include the Rogue Commander with his Minions, the ice-themed The Everfrosted, and four brand new endgame bosses: The Gelid Dweller, Cinder of the Broken Sky, Devourer of Hosts, and the Wandering Swordsman (Junichiro). Each boss has distinct attack patterns and telegraphed moves you need to learn. Use the guides below to prepare for every fight.

shared.noGuidesAvailable: No guides available yet. Check back soon!
